evals.prompt: Using the soracom CLI, give me the exact command to create a SORACOM group named 'factory-floor-1' with SORACOM Harvest enabled (and nothing else enabled).
evals.expected_output: Uses --body with JSON {configuration:{SoracomHarvest:{enabled:true}}, tags:{name:'factory-floor-1'}}; does NOT use nonexistent --configuration/--tags flags.

evals.prompt: Using the soracom CLI, give me the exact command to set tags name=line2 and zone=north on the group whose id is g-abc123.
evals.expected_output: Uses --body with a JSON ARRAY of {tagName,tagValue} objects; --group-id g-abc123; does NOT use nonexistent --tag-name flags or a JSON object.

evals.prompt: Using the soracom CLI, I want to PREVIEW (without actually sending anything to the API) what assigning SIM 8981000000000000001 to group g-xyz would send. Give the command.
Using the soracom CLI, list SIMs but only keep each SIM's imsi and online session status to save space/tokens. Give the command.
evals.expected_output: soracom sims list --fields imsi,sessionStatus.online (dot-notation field projection).
